findings.description: File opened without context manager (possible leak).
findings.remediation: Use `with open(...) as f:` to ensure closure.
findings.what_is_wrong: Resources are not reliably closed on all paths.
findings.why_dangerous: Exhaustion leads to denial of service.
findings.real_world_impact: File descriptor exhaustion, memory growth, outages.
findings.secure_example: with open(path) as f: data = f.read()

summary: Analysis complete: risk score 12/100 (MEDIUM). Found 1 issue(s) across 1 categories. ML suspicious probability: 5%.
recommendations: [MEDIUM] RESOURCE_LEAK: Use `with open(...) as f:` to ensure closure.
